summary: Implemented hosted telemetry deploy preflight and verifier without live Cloudflare mutation. Added pure deploy readiness helpers, a gated package script wrapper, package scripts for preflight/verify/live deploy, tests for auth/binding/build/verify output shape, and runbook commands. Live deployment now requires explicit deploy:live plus NARADA_SITE_TELEMETRY_DEPLOY_APPROVED=1.

verification.result: passed: returned blocked/non-mutating preflight for missing wrangler auth reference and placeholder KV/D1 ids

residuals: No live Cloudflare deploy or post-deploy smoke was performed.
A real deployment still needs non-placeholder local wrangler config, operator capability grant, Cloudflare auth, secret bindings, and post-deploy smoke evidence.
